In the next verse he deals with the effects of the existence of
water i.e. its source like tank, well, etc., in the different directions.
srrsinfe^ g^rPr: ^ i

If there is water to the east, south-east, south, south-west,
west, north-west, north and north-east of a house, the effects would
be (1) loss of children, (2) danger from fire, (3) fear of enemies,
(4) quarrel among (or with) women, (5) frailty of women, (6)
poverty, (7) increase of wealth, and (8) prosperity of children in
order.
